# full-config

Full OIDC config from operator-manual SSO docs (Azure AD, claims, scopes, audiences, userinfo, PKCE, rootCA)

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/oidc/full-config` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  oidc.config: |
    name: Azure
    issuer: https://login.microsoftonline.com/ffffffff-ffff-ffff-ffff-ffffffffffff/v2.0
    clientID: aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa
    clientSecret: $oidc.azure.clientSecret
    cliClientID: bbbbbbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbbbbbbbbbb
    requestedScopes:
      - openid
      - profile
      - email
      - offline_access
    allowedAudiences:
      - aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa
      - api://argocd
    requestedIDTokenClaims:
      groups:
        essential: true
      email:
        essential: true
        value: user@example.com
      roles:
        values:
          - admin
          - reader
    enableUserInfoGroups: true
    userInfoPath: /oidc/userinfo
    userInfoBaseURL: https://graph.microsoft.com
    userInfoCacheExpiration: 5m
    logoutURL: https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/logout?post_logout_redirect_uri={{logoutRedirectURL}}
    rootCA: |
      -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
      MIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEA0Z3VS5JJcds3xfn/ygWy
      F1PEXAMPLE
      -----END CERTIFICATE-----
    enablePKCEAuthentication: true
    skipAudienceCheckWhenTokenHasNoAudience: true
    domainHint: contoso.com
    refreshTokenThreshold: 10m
    azure:
      useWorkloadIdentity: true
      graphApiEndpoint: https://graph.microsoft.com
      enableUserGroupOverageClaim: true
      userGroupOverageClaimCacheExpiration: 1h
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    oidc:
      allowedAudiences:
      - aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa
      - api://argocd
      azure:
        graphAPIEndpointURL: https://graph.microsoft.com
        useWorkloadIdentity: true
        userGroupOverageClaim:
          cacheExpiration: 1h0m0s
          enabled: true
      cliClientID: bbbbbbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbbbbbbbbbb
      clientID: aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa
      clientSecretRef:
        key: oidc.azure.clientSecret
        name: argocd-secret
      domainHint: contoso.com
      issuerURL: https://login.microsoftonline.com/ffffffff-ffff-ffff-ffff-ffffffffffff/v2.0
      logoutURL: https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/logout?post_logout_redirect_uri={{logoutRedirectURL}}
      name: Azure
      pkceAuthenticationEnabled: true
      refreshTokenThreshold: 10m0s
      requestedIDTokenClaims:
        email:
          essential: true
          value: user@example.com
        groups:
          essential: true
        roles:
          values:
          - admin
          - reader
      requestedScopes:
      - openid
      - profile
      - email
      - offline_access
      rootCA: |
        -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
        MIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEA0Z3VS5JJcds3xfn/ygWy
        F1PEXAMPLE
        -----END CERTIFICATE-----
      skipAudienceCheckWhenTokenHasNoAudience: true
      userInfo:
        baseURL: https://graph.microsoft.com
        cacheExpiration: 5m0s
        groupsEnabled: true
        path: /oidc/userinfo
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  oidc.config: |
    allowedAudiences:
    - aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa
    - api://argocd
    azure:
      graphApiEndpoint: https://graph.microsoft.com
      useWorkloadIdentity: true
      userGroupOverageClaim:
        cacheExpiration: 1h0m0s
        enabled: true
    cliClientID: bbbbbbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbbbbbbbbbb
    clientID: aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa
    clientSecret: $oidc.azure.clientSecret
    domainHint: contoso.com
    enablePKCEAuthentication: true
    issuer: https://login.microsoftonline.com/ffffffff-ffff-ffff-ffff-ffffffffffff/v2.0
    logoutURL: https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/logout?post_logout_redirect_uri={{logoutRedirectURL}}
    name: Azure
    refreshTokenThreshold: 10m0s
    requestedIDTokenClaims:
      email:
        essential: true
        value: user@example.com
      groups:
        essential: true
      roles:
        values:
        - admin
        - reader
    requestedScopes:
    - openid
    - profile
    - email
    - offline_access
    rootCA: |
      -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
      MIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEA0Z3VS5JJcds3xfn/ygWy
      F1PEXAMPLE
      -----END CERTIFICATE-----
    skipAudienceCheckWhenTokenHasNoAudience: true
    userInfo:
      baseURL: https://graph.microsoft.com
      cacheExpiration: 5m0s
      groupsEnabled: true
      path: /oidc/userinfo
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
